verse.name: v1
verse.lines: It takes a lot of growing for a tree to reach the sky It takes a lot of rain to help it grow It takes a lot of running for a child to catch the wind It takes a lot of walking to learn to run

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And I'm growing in Jesus getting stronger Each and every day and in every way 'Cause Jesus is growing in me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Many times I felt discouraged when the rain got in my way I didn't know that it could make me grow. And everytime I run ahead I always miss the turn I end up walking back to what I've learned
